Privacy
Home/Referral Partner Program/Referral Partner terms

Referral Partner Program

Referral Partner terms

The partner program stays simple, but it is more structured than the client referral program because approvals and payouts are involved.

Referral ProgramFor clients and contacts who want future Opticable credit.Referral Partner ProgramFor businesses and professionals sending repeat referrals.Referral PortalReview your code, share link, referrals, and rewards.Request a quoteUse your referral code in the quote request.

Eligibility

This program is for businesses and professionals referring new Quebec projects to Opticable.

Approval

Every partner request is validated before the partner account is created.

Client offer

This program does not promise an automatic discount to the referred client.

Partner payout

Completed and paid projects earn a fixed payout based on project size: CAD 250 below 10,000, CAD 500 from 10,000 to 24,999.99, and CAD 1,000 at 25,000 and up.

When payout is earned

Payout is earned only after the referred project is completed and fully paid.

Exclusions

Self-referrals, same-company abuse, existing requests already open with Opticable, taxes, recurring services, support calls, already-signed work, and already-discounted scopes are excluded.

Commission settlement

Commissions are not withdrawn automatically from the portal. The partner must contact Opticable to request settlement, then Opticable confirms the transfer and updates the portal.

Opticable installs and manages technology systems for commercial buildings in Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, the North Shore, the Laurentians, and across Quebec.

9453-4757 Québec Inc.
Licence RBQ : 5864-1648-01

Contact details

  • Quote requestsquotes@opticable.ca
  • Technical supportsupport@opticable.ca
  • Phone514-316-7236
  • Quotes and inquiriesMonday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM: by phone, email, or form
  • WeekendsSaturday and Sunday, 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM: by email or form only
  • Technical supportMonday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM · Saturday and Sunday, 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM
